hero.title: Craft Your Dream Home
hero.subtitle: The all-in-one platform connecting homeowners, designers, and contractors
about.title: A Smart Ecosystem for Home Renovation
about.desc: Hezeyun leverages technology to transform the home renovation experience — helping homeowners find the right professionals, and empowering service providers with quality projects.
about.owner.title: Homeowner
about.owner.desc: Post requirements, get smart matches with designers and contractors, manage your project online.
about.designer.title: Designer
about.designer.desc: Showcase your portfolio, receive targeted leads, communicate proposals online — all in one place.
about.worker.title: Contractor
about.worker.desc: Verified credentials, local project matching, transparent payments — focus on what you do best.
features.title: Everything You Need, One Platform
features.inspiration.title: Inspiration Gallery
features.inspiration.desc: Browse thousands of real renovation projects. Save, like, and comment to find your dream style.
features.match.title: Smart Matching
features.match.desc: AI-powered recommendations based on your needs, budget, and location for the perfect professional.
features.booking.title: Online Booking
features.booking.desc: Book your favorite designer or contractor with one tap. Choose your schedule, communicate easily.
features.chat.title: Real-time Chat
features.chat.desc: Built-in messaging to discuss design details, project updates, and materials with your team.
features.project.title: Project Management
features.project.desc: Visual timeline tracking, milestone verification, file management — renovation progress at a glance.
features.payment.title: Secure Payments
features.payment.desc: Escrow protection, staged payments, and after-sales support for every transaction.
gallery.title: Discover Your Dream Home
gallery.desc: Thousands of real renovation cases spanning Nordic, Modern, Japanese, Chinese, and more styles.
process.title: Five Steps to Your Dream Home
process.step1.title: Post Requirements
process.step1.desc: Describe your layout, style, and budget
process.step2.title: Smart Match
process.step2.desc: Get matched with the best professionals
process.step3.title: Confirm Plan
process.step3.desc: Discuss and finalize the design online
process.step4.title: Track Progress
process.step5.title: Move In
process.step5.desc: Inspect, approve, and enjoy your new home
join.title: Join Hezeyun, Grow Together
join.desc: Open to designers, contractors, and material suppliers. Share our platform traffic and opportunities.
join.benefit1.title: Quality Leads
join.benefit1.desc: Smart order distribution, no more wasted marketing
join.benefit2.title: Brand Building
join.benefit2.desc: Showcase work, earn reviews, build your reputation
join.benefit3.title: Secure Deals
join.benefit3.desc: Escrow payments, contract management, peace of mind
join.benefit4.title: Data Insights
join.benefit4.desc: Real-time business analytics to drive decisions
download.title: Start Your Home Journey Today
download.desc: Scan the QR code or tap the button to download Hezeyun and experience smart home renovation.
